pages.text: The $(item)Large Nether Soul Skyseed$() — a $(item)Large Desert Skyseed$() centred in soul sand + bone blocks. A sprawling Soul Sand Valley.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Soul sand and bones from any $(item)Nether Soul$() isle.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A sprawling $(bold)Soul Sand Valley$() — soul sand and soul soil riddled with $(item)bone$() fossils, lit by soul fire, haunted by Skeletons.
$(bold)Crafted$()$(br)A $(item)Large Desert Skyseed$() in the centre of a 3x3 of $(item)soul sand$() and $(item)bone blocks$().
